auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Deepgram API key sent as Authorization: Token <API_KEY>. Create or manage keys in the Deepgram Console and API key guide: https://developers.deepgram.com/docs/create-additional-api-keys.

actions.name: get_model
actions.description: Get metadata for one public Deepgram model.

modelId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram model.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Deepgram model.

anyOf.description: The human-readable model name.
The canonical model identifier.
The architecture family of the model.

languages.description: The language codes supported by the model.

anyOf.description: The model version string.
The unique identifier of the model.
Whether the model supports batch processing.
Whether the model supports streaming processing.
Whether the model supports formatted output.
The accent of the model voice.
The age descriptor of the model voice.
The accent color associated with the model.
The display name of the model.
The image URL for the model.
The sample audio URL for the model.

tags.description: The descriptive tags attached to the model.

use_cases.description: The suggested use cases attached to the model.

anyOf.description: Additional metadata for a Deepgram text-to-speech model.

model.description: A Deepgram model object that can represent either a speech-to-text or text-to-speech model.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Deepgram model.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get details for one Deepgram project.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Deepgram project.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the project.
The display name of the project.
Whether the project is opted out of the Model Improvement Program.

project.description: A Deepgram project object returned by the Management API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Deepgram project.

actions.name: get_project_model
actions.description: Get metadata for one model available to a Deepgram project.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram project.

modelId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram model.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a model available to a Deepgram project.

anyOf.description: The human-readable model name.
The canonical model identifier.
The architecture family of the model.

languages.description: The language codes supported by the model.

anyOf.description: The model version string.
The unique identifier of the model.
Whether the model supports batch processing.
Whether the model supports streaming processing.
Whether the model supports formatted output.
The accent of the model voice.
The age descriptor of the model voice.
The accent color associated with the model.
The display name of the model.
The image URL for the model.
The sample audio URL for the model.

tags.description: The descriptive tags attached to the model.

use_cases.description: The suggested use cases attached to the model.

anyOf.description: Additional metadata for a Deepgram text-to-speech model.

model.description: A Deepgram model object that can represent either a speech-to-text or text-to-speech model.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a model available to a Deepgram project.

actions.name: list_models
actions.description: List the latest public Deepgram models.

The canonical model identifier.
The architecture family of the model.

languages.description: The language codes supported by the model.

anyOf.description: Additional metadata for a Deepgram text-to-speech model.

items.description: A Deepgram model object that can represent either a speech-to-text or text-to-speech model.

stt.description: The speech-to-text models returned by Deepgram.

anyOf.description: The human-readable model name.
The canonical model identifier.

actions.name: list_project_balances
actions.description: List the outstanding balances for a Deepgram project.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Deepgram project balances.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the balance.
The remaining balance amount.
The units of the balance, such as USD.
The purchase order or reference identifier.

balances.description: The balance entries returned for the project.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Deepgram project balances.

actions.name: list_project_keys
actions.description: List the API keys associated with a Deepgram project.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Deepgram project.

status.description: The Deepgram project API key status to filter by.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing API keys in a Deepgram project.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the member.
The email address of the member.

member.description: A Deepgram project member attached to an API key.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the API key.
The comment attached to the API key.

scopes.description: The scopes granted to the API key.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the API key was created.

items.description: A Deepgram project API key record.

apiKeys.description: The API keys returned for the project.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Deepgram project API keys.
